content.text:
[cron:investment-research-event-watch-0945 09:45来福投研会-临时会商监控] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_investment_research_event_watch.py
3. 若 event watch 为 triggered，则继续运行 python3 scripts/generate_investment_research_temporary_meeting_broadcast.py
4. 读取 event watch md/json；若已生成 temporary meeting broadcast，则优先读取该广播
5. 如果 status=no_trigger，则回复 NO_REPLY
6. 如果 status=triggered，则用中文简短汇报：触发项、是否建议临时会商、建议参与角色、temporary meeting broadcast 路径、event watch 路径
7. 不要输出可执行买价
Current time: Wednesday, April 22nd, 2026 - 1:45 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-22 05:45 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
